{{Sidebar |name = Fuke Zen |pretitle = Part of a series on |title = [[Komusō]] |image = [[File:Komuso Buddhist monk beggar Kita-kamakura.jpg|120px]] |contentclass = hlist
|heading1 = People |content1 = *Ennin *Ichirōsō *[[Ikkyū]] *Kakushin *Kyochiku Zenji/Kichiku *[[Puhua|Fuke/Puhua]] *Rōan *Zhang Bai *Komu *[[Kinko Kurosawa]] *Chang Po/Chōhaku
|heading2 = Philosophy |content2 = *[[Zen]] *[[Rinzai school|Rinzai-shū]]
|heading3 = Places |content3 = *Reiho-ji *[[Ichigatsu-ji]] *Icchoken *Kokoku-ji *[[Tōfuku-ji]] **[[Myōan-ji]] **Zenkei-in *[[Kokutai-ji]] *Shukugawara *Kokuzo-do
|heading4 = Topics |content4 = *[[Buddhist music]] *[[Edo period|Edo period Japan]] *[[Honkyoku]] *[[Komusō]] *[[Rōnin]] *[[Shakuhachi]] **[[Hotchiku]] *[[Tokugawa shogunate]] *[[Suizen]] *[[Traditional Japanese music]]
|heading5 = Literature |content5 = *''Boro-no-Techō'' *''Kyotaku Denki [Kokuji Kai]''
}}<noinclude> [[Category:Buddhism templates|{{PAGENAME}}]] [[Category:Buddhism in Japan templates]] </noinclude>

{{Sidebar |name = Fuke Zen |pretitle = Part of a series on |title = [[Komusō]] |image = [[File:Komuso Buddhist monk beggar Kita-kamakura.jpg|120px]] |contentclass = hlist
|heading1 = People |content1 = *Ennin *Ichirōsō *[[Ikkyū]] *Kakushin *Kyochiku Zenji/Kichiku *[[Puhua|Fuke/Puhua]] *Rōan *Zhang Bai *Komu *[[Kinko Kurosawa]] *Chang Po/Chōhaku
|heading2 = Philosophy |content2 = *[[Zen]] *[[Rinzai school|Rinzai-shū]]
|heading3 = Places |content3 = *Reiho-ji *[[Ichigatsu-ji]] *Icchoken *Kokoku-ji *[[Tōfuku-ji]] **[[Myōan-ji]] **Zenkei-in *[[Kokutai-ji]] *Shukugawara *Kokuzo-do
|heading4 = Topics |content4 = *[[Buddhist music]] *[[Edo period|Edo period Japan]] *[[Honkyoku]] *[[Komusō]] *[[Rōnin]] *[[Shakuhachi]] **[[Hotchiku]] *[[Tokugawa shogunate]] *[[Suizen]] *[[Traditional Japanese music]]
|heading5 = Literature |content5 = *''Boro-no-Techō'' *''Kyotaku Denki [Kokuji Kai]''
}}<noinclude>
